title: DeFi Security 101 2025 - From Fuzzing to Formal Verification | Kevin Lotz, Certora
description:
DeFi Security 101 is a one-day intensive course designed for builders who want to deepen their understanding of web3 security fundamentals.

“From Fuzzing to Formal Verification” was led by Kevin Lotz, Formal Verification Researcher at Certora.

DSS 101 2025 took place in Buenos Aires, Argentina, during Devconnect week, as part of the 4th edition of the DeFi Security Summit (DSS).

Learn more about the program: https://luma.com/8kje8uh3
